message:
feat(frankenpandas): add ValidityMask to the prelude (fd90.203 / br-mn03v)

ValidityMask has a dedicated README subsection ("ValidityMask: Bitpacked
Null Tracking", lines 261-278) and is listed among the types that derive
Serialize + Deserialize at line 1567. It was exposed at the top-level
re-export (line 29 via fp_columnar) but missing from the prelude.

Fix:
- Add ValidityMask to crate::prelude
- Extend readme_serialization_compiles_and_runs to round-trip a small
  ValidityMask (3 elements with one NaN) through serde_json. Verifies
  the README claim: "ValidityMask serializes as a Vec<bool> for JSON
  compatibility but uses bitpacked Vec<u64> in memory."

Verified: 35 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"frankenpandas-mebh","title":"Add dataframe_memory_usage null hardened conformance coverage","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-18T20:40:48.318342261Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T20:41:15.745809956Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T20:41:15.744045374Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-mle2r","title":"fd90.176: add DataFrame Introspection integration test (locks in fd90.175 dtypes fix)","description":"fd90.74-175 follow-on. The README's 'DataFrame Introspection' section (lines 1145-1167) hasn't been integration-tested. Locks in fd90.175's dtypes() Result-return fix and exercises the broader introspection API.

Fix: add 'readme_dataframe_introspection_compiles_and_runs' which mirrors the example. Build a small DataFrame and exercise:
  - df.shape() returns (usize, usize)
  - df.dtypes()? returns a Series (fd90.175 fix)
  - df.info() returns a String
  - df.memory_usage()? returns a Series
  - df.ndim() returns usize (always 2 for DataFrame)
  - df.axes() returns (Vec<IndexLabel>, Vec<String>)
  - df.is_empty() returns bool
  - df1.equals(&df2) returns bool
  - df1.compare(&df2)? returns DataFrame
  - df.squeeze(axis)? on single-cell returns Series
  - series.iat(pos)? / series.at(&label)? scalar accessors

Pure additive test.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"test","created_at":"2026-04-26T17:23:36.742107203Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-26T17:25:34.259897369Z","closed_at":"2026-04-26T17:25:34.257025193Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-mmw","title":"Add DataFrame GroupBy.all conformance test coverage","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-17T08:30:11.620045945Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-17T08:31:43.252195096Z","closed_at":"2026-04-17T08:31:43.249879643Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-mn03v","title":"fd90.203: Add ValidityMask to the prelude + serde round-trip test","description":"fd90.203: Add ValidityMask to the prelude.

The README has an entire dedicated subsection on ValidityMask (lines 261-278: "ValidityMask: Bitpacked Null Tracking") and lists it among the types that "derive Serialize + Deserialize" in the Serialization section (line 1567). It is currently exposed at the top-level (line 29 via fp_columnar) but not in the prelude.

User code following the README that needs to inspect or construct a ValidityMask (e.g., for a custom column type) requires `use frankenpandas::ValidityMask;` after `use frankenpandas::prelude::*;`.

Scope:
- Add ValidityMask to the prelude module
- Extend readme_serialization_compiles_and_runs to round-trip a small ValidityMask via serde_json (per the README's claim that it serializes as a Vec<bool>)
